blended.narrative: Mad River Glen is expecting flurries over the next 48 hours with trace amounts. Snow levels around 2,387 ft. The 14-day outlook shows 9 inches total. Mild temps with highs near 54°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Monday: light rain showers, highs of 49°F.
Friday: 2.3" of snow, highs of 34°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
